title: GildedGUI
description: A dark stone menu gui with a fancy golden trim.
body:
Minecraft's default gui is a bit dull, so I created a fancier theme to use in my modpack. If you like the style, feel free to use the resource pack in your own playthroughs as well!

**Current features:**
- Textures for the vanilla widgets, title, and hotbar.
- Textures for a handful of mods that don't use the default widgets for their buttons ([Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds), [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [Mixtape](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixtape), and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu))


**Plans:**
- More ingame textures, for inventories and containers (Kind of intimidated to start because of all the different containers lol)
- Possibly an updated vanilla version (GUI textures work differently in current versions of the game)
